artifactBrief.artifactThesis: Create an interactive HTML artifact that showcases the launch of an AI tools editorial
artifactBrief.audience: AI tools editors and industry professionals
artifactBrief.jobToBeDone: engage with an interactive launch page for an AI tools editorial
requiredInteractions: click to explore AI tools features
hover to reveal editorial content highlights

judge.aestheticVerdict: Typography and layout feel deliberate enough to carry the artifact.
judge.interactionVerdict: Interaction model is visible and materially changes the page state.
issueClasses: Missing closing tag for hover background color
judge.rationale: Ensure all CSS rules are properly closed Render evaluation: Render evaluation found repairable desktop/mobile issues with an overall score of 18/25.

strengths: Interactive elements with hover and click

materialization.normalizedIntent: Create an interactive HTML artifact for an AI tools editorial launch page
notes: Conversation remains the control plane; this artifact is the work product.
Renderer choice is explicit in the typed outcome request.
Verification state, not worker prose, authorizes the final Studio summary.
The artifact includes a hero section, a control bar, two populated evidence surfaces, and a shared detail region.
All interactions are pre-rendered with data attributes and keyboard accessibility.
HTML output still depends on too many Studio repair shims to qualify as a native surfaced artifact.
Captured viewports show weak alignment or inconsistent spacing cadence.
Render evaluation found repairable desktop/mobile issues with an overall score of 18/25.
Winning candidate candidate-1 selected via typed judging.
